bug.js(23,14): error TS2339: Property 'y' does not exist on type 'object'.


==== bug.js (1 errors) ====
    /**
     * @callback cb
     * @param x.y
     */
    
    /**
     * @callback cb2
     * @param {object} x
     * @param {string} x.y
     */
    
    /**
     * @overload
     * @param {object} x
     * @param {string} x.y
     * @returns {string}
     */
    /**
     * @param {object} x
     * @returns {string}
     */
    function foo(x) {
        return x.y;
                 ~
!!! error TS2339: Property 'y' does not exist on type 'object'.
    }
